description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-radio-group` (T1-11). 6/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, slotted radio child typing, value/selected-value typing, form association via ElementInternals
2. Accessibility — `role="radiogroup"` with `aria-labelledby`, individual radios `role="radio"` with `aria-checked`, roving tabindex (only one radio in tab order at a time), arrow keys navigate within group, axe-core pass
3. Tests — selection behavior, keyboard navigation (arrows), form association and submission, required validation, disabled group/individual radios
4. Storybook — horizontal/vertical layout, required, error state, disabled variants
5. CSS — consistent radio styling, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable with slotted radios

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-radio-group — T1-11 antagonistic quality review
